description: A Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for Apache Kafka implemented in Go, leveraging franz-go and mcp-go.

findings.title: INSUFFICIENT_TOOL_DATA
findings.description: Tool 'kafka_cluster_overview' has no description - agents cannot reason about its purpose, and static analysis coverage is limited
findings.recommendation: Review and remediate the identified issue.
